action.reasoning: Observation: iteration 12 training command failed because train.py was truncated (syntax error). The workspace shows train.py truncated at EMA class; previous iterations also failed due to truncation. Current best accuracy 0.2157 from CLIP 5-epoch baseline. DINOv2 is a strong complementary model; training it and ensemble with CLIP could improve OOD. Analysis: Need complete, robust train.py with DINOv2 support, mixed precision, per-domain validation, and checkpointing. Time budget 2.25h allows 10-epoch DINOv2 training (~80 min). Decision: rewrite train.py (complete), update model.py to support 'vit_base_patch14_dinov2.lvd142m' via timm, fix predict.py to use backbone from checkpoint. Run training for 10 epochs with AdamW, lr=1e-4, RandAugment, batch 64/GPU, cosine schedule, save best model by sketch accuracy. Then submit eval with ensemble predict.py (DINOv2 + existing CLIP checkpoint).
